name: DataNexus MCP
description: AI-Ready access to public data intelligence via the Model Context Protocol. 23 tools across nonprofit data, OSS vulnerability intelligence, professional licences, domain & DNS, and patent data. Token-efficient AI-Ready Markdown output. Verified source. No API key required for most tools.

tools.name: fetch_nonprofit_by_ein
tools.description: Fetch IRS 990 data for any US nonprofit by EIN. Returns revenue, expenses, and mission in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IRS EO BMF. Token-efficient.

tools.name: fetch_package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: Fetch all known CVEs for any open source package across PyPI, npm, Maven, Go, Cargo. Returns severity, CVSS score, and fixed versions in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: Google OSV.dev + NIST NVD. Token-efficient.

tools.name: fetch_npi_provider
tools.description: Fetch NPI registration details for any US healthcare provider. Returns speciality, taxonomy, and status in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: NPPES NPI Registry (CMS). Token-efficient.

tools.name: fetch_domain_rdap
tools.description: Fetch domain registration details via IANA RDAP. Returns registrar, expiry date, and nameservers in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: IANA RDAP. Token-efficient.

tools.name: fetch_patent_by_number
tools.description: Fetch patent details by number from EPO, USPTO, or WIPO. Returns title, abstract, inventors, and citation count in AI-Ready Markdown. Verified source: EPO OPS + USPTO PatentsView. Token-efficient.

tools.name: validate_tool_output
tools.description: Validate any DataNexus tool response for data quality anomalies. Two-layer validation: deterministic rules + Haiku AI review. Auto-files feedback on confirmed issues. AI-Ready output. Token-efficient. Verified source: DataNexus internal validator.
